title: EasyEnchant
description: A simple a way of enchanting the items
body:
EasyEnchant Plugin Features
GUI System
Main Enchantment Menu: Displays a comprehensive list of all available enchantments for the item in your hand.

Level Selection Interface: Allows you to choose the exact level of enchantment you want to apply.

Item Preview: View your item in the GUI while selecting enchantments, providing a live preview of the enchantment's effect.

User-Friendly Navigation: Features intuitive navigation options, including easy-to-use back buttons and exit options for smooth user experience.
Powerful Enchanting Capabilities
Apply Any Enchantment: Grant any enchantment that is compatible with the item in hand, including those not normally available in the vanilla game.

Custom Enchantment Levels: Select the precise level for each enchantment, up to the enchantment’s maximum allowed level.

Unsafe Enchantments: Unlock the ability to apply enchantments beyond Minecraft's vanilla limits, allowing for exciting custom experiences.

Filter System: Automatically filters out curses or unwanted enchantments from appearing in the selection, ensuring a cleaner and safer enchantment process.
Advanced Customization
Fully Configurable Messages: Customize every plugin message, offering flexibility for different server setups and player experiences.

GUI Customization: Modify inventory sizes, item titles, and other GUI elements to match the aesthetic or theme of your server.

Permission-Based Access: Control who can use the plugin through a permissions system, allowing fine-tuned access management.
Commands
/easyenchant or /ee - Opens the enchantment GUI for users to start enchanting.

/easyenchant reload - Reloads the plugin’s configuration settings.
Permissions
easyenchant.use - Grants permission for players to use the enchanting GUI (default: true).

easyenchant.reload - Grants permission to reload the plugin’s configuration (default: op).
